hero.noServerTagline: Add or select a server in Realmlist.
hero.quickAccessSub: Everything you need, in one place

realmlistView.title: Realmlist
realmlistView.subtitle: Pick a realm or add your own. Official ones ship with the launcher.
realmlistView.emptyUser: You haven't added any servers yet. Use «Add server».
realmlistView.name: Name
realmlistView.realmlistHint: Paste the host only or the full set realmlist … line

addonsView.title: Addons
addonsView.subtitle: Install 3.3.5a-compatible addons for your client language.
addonsView.localeHintUnset: Set the client path in Settings and choose the language.
addonsView.localeHintNoPath: Client path missing. Set it in Settings or on the active server.

modsView.title: Mods
modsView.subtitle: Install .MPQ patches for textures, maps, and models on your 3.3.5a client.
modsView.warning: Patches can modify client files. Only catalog mods are installed. Use them at your own risk.
modsView.localeHintUnset: Set the client path in Settings and choose the language.
modsView.localeHintNoPath: Client path is missing. Set it in Settings or on the active server.
modsView.deleteConfirm: Delete {name} ({file})? You can reinstall it from the catalog.

keybindsView.title: Keybinds
keybindsView.subtitle: Copy your keyboard bindings from one account to another (using the active server's client).
keybindsView.noGamePath: Set the client path in Settings (or on the active server) to use this feature.
keybindsView.noAccounts: No accounts found. Launch the game at least once so they are created.
keybindsView.loadFailed: Could not read the account list.
keybindsView.pickDestinations: Choose at least one destination account.
keybindsView.originMissingBindings: The source account has no bindings-cache.wtf.
keybindsView.confirmMessage: Copy keybinds from «{origin}» to {count} account(s)? Destinations will be overwritten; existing binds are backed up (.bak) first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Client path, language, and launcher behavior.
settings.gamePathHint: Used when the active server has no own path.
settings.localeNone: No language detected. Choose one from the list.
settings.localeMultiple: Multiple languages detected ({list}). Pick the one your client uses.
settings.addonsRemoteHint: Falls back to embedded catalog if download fails.
settings.uiLanguageHint: Uses your Windows language the first time you open the launcher.
settings.autostartHint: Opens the launcher when you turn on your PC.
settings.minimizeTrayHint: The X hides the launcher; exit from the tray icon.
settings.checkUpdatesOnStartHint: Looks for a new version when you open the launcher.
settings.upToDateWithVersion: You're on the latest version — v{version}

updater.title: Update available
updater.checkFailed: Could not check for updates. Check your connection.
updater.installFailed: Could not download or install the update.

launch.missingGamePathHint: Open Settings, pick WoW.exe with Browse… and save.
launch.missingGamePathServerHint: Check this server's client path or Settings.
launch.genericHint: Make sure WoW.exe exists and the path in Settings is correct.

server.noActiveHint: Pick one in Realmlist or add your own.
server.invalidRealmlistHint: Enter the host or paste the full set realmlist … line.

settings.invalidExe: Client path must point to WoW.exe.
settings.invalidExeHint: Use Browse… to pick the correct executable.
settings.saveFailedHint: Try again. If it persists, restart the launcher.
settings.autostartFailed: Could not change Start with Windows.
settings.autostartFailedHint: Run the launcher as administrator once or check system permissions.
settings.localeRequiredHint: Detect automatically or pick from the list.
settings.localeDetectFailedHint: Make sure Data/ contains a valid locale (locale-XXXX.MPQ + realmlist.wtf).

news.missingUrlHint: Enter it in Settings and save.
news.loadFailedHint: Check the URL in Settings and that the server returns valid JSON.

addons.noLocaleHint: Open Settings, select WoW.exe and choose the detected language.
addons.noGamePathHint: Set it in Settings or on the active server.
addons.catalogFailed: Could not load the addon catalog.
addons.catalogFailedHint: Check your connection or the catalog URL in Settings.
addons.installFailedHint: Check the download URL and that the ZIP is valid.
addons.uninstallFailedHint: Close WoW if it is using the addon folders and try again.

mods.noGamePathHint: Set it in Settings or on the active server.
mods.catalogFailed: Could not load the mod catalog.
mods.catalogFailedHint: Check your connection or the catalog URL.
mods.installFailedHint: Check the download URL and that the .MPQ or ZIP file is valid.
mods.toggleFailed: Could not enable or disable the mod.
mods.toggleFailedHint: Close WoW if it is open and try again.
mods.deleteFailedHint: Close WoW if it is using the file and try again.
